M8/#624 COMM S KAPLAN, CSR L NAJERA, CLK H HAMILTON PRESENT BRENT KERNAN FOR PLAINTIFF, WHO IS NOT PRESENT. ANGEL & ANITA SALCEDO IN PROPRIA PERSONA. CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, SETTLED AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT PURS TO STIPULATION FOR PLTF FOR POSSESSION OF 3356 CESAR CHAVEZ #A, S.F, $6235 RENT & DAMAGES, REASONABLE FEES & COSTS. WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT STAYED PENDING COMPLETION OF TERMS OF STIPULATION. DEFTS TO PAY $6875 BACK RENT & ATTY FEES AS FOLLOWS: $4075. ON OR BEFORE 2-25-98; $1150 ON OR BEFORE 3-16-98; $1650 ON OR BEFORE 3-16-98 IN CASH OR MONEY ORDER AT MR. KERNAN'S OFFICE OR ASSOCIATED REALTY. THEREAFTER, RENT IS DUE ON THE FIRST OF EACH MONTH. IF DEFTS FAIL TO PAY INSTALLMENTS, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO AN IMMEDIATE WRIT UPON DECLARATION UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY, EX PARTE & W/O NOTICE. IF DEFT'S COMPLY, PLTF WILL DISM W/O PREJUDICE. WRITTEN MEMORIALIZATION OF STIPULATION TO BE SIGNED BY 2-25-98.
